text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Arima Kinen has arrived, and all
the participants gathered here are first-rate
racers. The Nakayama Racecourse is buzzing with
excitement.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Here we are at the final of the four races Fuji
Kiseki set out to challenge, and the stands are
bursting at the seams with eagerness!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: I believe in Fuji Kiseki! I know she can do this!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Me too! I came here to see her perform another
miracle!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Do you have a message for the racer you're
cheering for today?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Come on, everyone! Let's channel some of
our energy to Fuji! Ready, and...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Members
text_block_list.text: Good luck, Fujiii! You can do iiit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And, while everyone is waiting on the edges of
their seats for the race to begin...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That was such a loud cheer. Thank you. I
heard it perfectly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then she looks directly at me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: We've finally made it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Here we are at the finale. The 2,500-meter stage
of the Arima Kinen is all set.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This is my final scene. All that remains is to see
whether it'll conclude with tears of joy or sorrow...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Do I look radiant to you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: And how do you see me?
choice_data_list: As the brightest and most beautiful star.
As the brightest and most beautiful star.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'm so glad to have you here.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Well, then... I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch her stride off toward the final race, the
words "Give it your all" echo in my heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At long last, the curtains rise on the Arima Kinen!
